options.py: Wǒ yǒu gè Zhōngwén míng, jiào ___.
options.en: I have a Chinese name — it's ___.

options.py: Méiyǒu wàihào, jiào quán míng jiù hǎo.
options.en: No nickname — full name is fine.

options.zh: 有正面的意思，代表美好的东西。
options.py: Yǒu zhèngmiàn de yìsi, dàibiǎo měihǎo de dōngxi.
options.en: A positive meaning — represents something good.

options.py: Hái hǎo, jiùshì tài pǔtōng le.
options.en: It's fine — just a bit too common.

options.zh: 是我自己选的，家人同意了。
options.py: Shì wǒ zìjǐ xuǎn de, jiārén tóngyì le.
options.en: I chose it myself — family agreed.

options.py: Yǒu, shì jiārén de yīgè juédìng.
options.en: Yes — it was a family decision.

options.zh: 我很喜欢面食，特别是饺子。
options.py: Wǒ hěn xǐhuān miànshí, tèbié shì jiǎozi.
options.en: I love noodles and dumplings especially.

options.zh: 我喜欢家里的菜，妈妈做的最好。
options.py: Wǒ xǐhuān jiālǐ de cài, māma zuò de zuì hǎo.
options.en: I like home cooking — mum's is the best.
Very delicious! I highly recommend it.

options.zh: 有一点特别，可能要习惯。
options.py: Yǒu yīdiǎn tèbié, kěnéng yào xíguàn.
options.en: A bit unusual — might take getting used to.

options.py: Yǒu hěn duō tèsè de xiǎochī.
Hěn nán shuō, měi yàng dōu hǎochī!
options.en: Hard to say — everything is delicious!

options.py: Hěn duō rén xǐhuān chī huǒguō.

options.zh: 饺子、面条这些都很有名。
options.py: Jiǎozi, miàntiáo zhèxiē dōu hěn yǒumíng.
options.en: Dumplings and noodles — very well known.
A bit pricey, but worth it.

options.py: Kàn dìfāng, yǒu guì yǒu piányí.
Wǒ méi qùguò tài duō dìfāng.

options.en: I've been to France, the UK.

options.zh: 我想去欧洲，历史很丰富。
options.py: Wǒ xiǎng qù Ōuzhōu, lìshǐ hěn fēngfù.
options.en: I want to go to Europe — very rich history.

options.zh: 我想去日本，喜欢那里的文化。
options.py: Wǒ xiǎng qù Rìběn, xǐhuān nàlǐ de wénhuà.
options.en: I want to go to Japan — I love the culture.

options.zh: 我想去没去过的地方，越远越好。
options.py: Wǒ xiǎng qù méi qùguò de dìfāng, yuè yuǎn yuè hǎo.
options.en: Somewhere I've never been — the farther the better.

options.zh: 欧洲，那里的文化很有意思。
options.py: Ōuzhōu, nàlǐ de wénhuà hěn yǒuyìsi.
options.en: Europe — the culture is very interesting.

options.zh: 很难说，每个地方都不一样。
options.py: Hěn nán shuō, měi gè dìfāng dōu bù yīyàng.
options.en: Hard to say — every place is different.

options.py: Liǎng zhǒng dōu yǒu, kàn qù nǎlǐ.

options.zh: 我喜欢自己去，比较自由。
options.py: Wǒ xǐhuān zìjǐ qù, bǐjiào zìyóu.
options.en: I prefer going alone — more freedom.

options.zh: 我最喜欢吃当地的食物。
options.py: Wǒ zuì xǐhuān chī dāngdì de shíwù.
options.en: I love eating local food most.

options.zh: 我喜欢走路，发现新地方。
options.py: Wǒ xǐhuān zǒulù, fāxiàn xīn dìfāng.
options.en: I like walking and discovering new places.

options.zh: 我喜欢和当地人聊天，了解文化。
options.py: Wǒ xǐhuān hé dāngdì rén liáotiān, liǎojiě wénhuà.
options.en: I like chatting with locals — learning about the culture.

options.zh: 有很多特色的小店和街道。
options.py: Yǒu hěn duō tèsè de xiǎodiàn hé jiēdào.
options.en: Lots of unique shops and streets.

options.zh: 当地的食物很好吃，值得试试。
options.py: Dāngdì de shíwù hěn hǎochī, zhídé shì shi.
options.en: The local food is great — worth trying.

options.zh: 风景很美，特别适合走路探索。
options.py: Fēngjǐng hěn měi, tèbié shìhé zǒulù tànsuǒ.
options.en: Beautiful scenery — great for exploring on foot.

options.zh: 一起旅行，这对我们来说很重要。
options.py: Yīqǐ lǚxíng, zhè duì wǒmen lái shuō hěn zhòngyào.
options.en: Travel together — that's very important to us.

options.py: Hái kěyǐ, yǒu hǎo yǒu huài.
options.en: It's alright, has its ups and downs.

options.py: Bù tài xǐhuān, dànshì méi bànfǎ.
options.en: Not really, but what can you do.
Because I get to help people.

options.zh: 其实我也不确定，但是习惯了。
options.py: Qíshí wǒ yě bù quèdìng, dànshì xíguàn le.
options.en: Honestly not sure, but I'm used to it now.
I'm in management at a company.

options.zh: 我喜欢运动，特别是跑步。
options.py: Wǒ xǐhuān yùndòng, tèbié shì pǎobù.

options.zh: 我喜欢旅行，探索新的地方。
options.py: Wǒ xǐhuān lǚxíng, tànsuǒ xīn dìfāng.
options.en: I like travelling and exploring new places.

options.zh: 我喜欢和朋友出去，发现新地方。
options.py: Wǒ xǐhuān hé péngyǒu chūqù, fāxiàn xīn dìfāng.
options.en: I like going out with friends and discovering new places.
Very busy! No time at all.

options.py: Hái hǎo, bú shì tài máng.

options.zh: 最近有点忙，事情比较多。
options.py: Zuìjìn yǒudiǎn máng, shìqing bǐjiào duō.
options.en: Lately a bit busy — quite a lot going on.
I work at a foreign company.
I work from home — pretty flexible.

options.zh: 在公司办公室，每天通勤。
options.en: In an office — I commute every day.

options.py: Yǐjīng zuò le wǔ nián le.
options.en: I've been doing it for five years.

options.py: Bù tài jiǔ, cái yī liǎng nián.
options.en: Not long — only a year or two.

options.zh: 很久了，从毕业就开始了。
options.py: Hěn jiǔ le, cóng bìyè jiù kāishǐ le.
options.en: A long time — since I graduated.

options.zh: 其实是一个意外，说来话长。
options.py: Qíshí shì yīgè yìwài, shuō lái huà cháng.
options.en: Actually by accident — it's a long story.

options.py: Shì de, yīzhí shì wǒ de mèngxiǎng.
options.en: Yes, it's always been my dream.

options.py: Bú shì, dāngshí méi xiǎng zhème duō.
options.en: No, I didn't think about it much back then.

options.py: Yǒu yīdiǎn, bùguò méi xiǎng tài duō.
options.en: Sort of — but I didn't think too much about it.
Not sure, depends on how things go.

options.py: Bù, wǒ xiǎng huàn yīgè fāngxiàng.
options.en: No, I want to try something different.

options.zh: 看到成果的时候，很有成就感。
options.py: Kàn dào chéngguǒ de shíhòu, hěn yǒu chéngjiùgǎn.

options.en: Sometimes clients are hard to deal with.

options.zh: 要平衡工作和生活，不容易。
options.py: Yào pínghéng gōngzuò hé shēnghuó, bù róngyì.
options.en: Balancing work and life — not easy.

options.py: Yào kàn měi gè rén de qíngkuàng.
Tuījiàn, dàn yào yǒu rèqíng cái xíng.
options.en: Yes, but you need real passion.

options.py: Zuò le hěn duō nián gōngchéngshī.
options.en: I was an engineer for many years.

options.py: Hái kěyǐ, bù suàn tài gāo.
Gòu yòng jiù hǎo, bù tài zàiyì.
options.en: Enough is fine — I don't focus on it.

options.zh: 离这里不太远，大概两三个小时。
options.py: Lí zhèlǐ bù tài yuǎn, dàgài liǎng sān gè xiǎoshí.
options.en: Not too far — about two or three hours away.

options.zh: 在农村，很安静，和城市不一样。
options.py: Zài nóngcūn, hěn ānjìng, hé chéngshì bù yīyàng.
options.en: In the countryside — very quiet, quite different from the city.

options.py: Ǒu'ěr huì, bù tài cháng qù.

options.zh: 想去，但工作太忙，没时间。
options.py: Xiǎng qù, dàn gōngzuò tài máng, méi shíjiān.
options.en: Would like to, but work is too busy — no time.

options.zh: 我跟妻子和父母住在一起。
options.py: Wǒ gēn qīzi hé fùmǔ zhù zài yīqǐ.
options.en: I live with my wife and parents.

options.zh: 因为我喜欢这里的生活节奏。
options.py: Yīnwèi wǒ xǐhuān zhèlǐ de shēnghuó jiézòu.
options.en: Because I love the pace of life here.

options.py: Zhù le shí jǐ nián le.

options.zh: 很久了，我在这里长大的。
options.py: Hěn jiǔ le, wǒ zài zhèlǐ zhǎng dà de.
options.en: A long time — I grew up here.
Yes, sometimes I miss it a lot.

options.zh: 不太想，现在这里也很好。
options.py: Bù tài xiǎng, xiànzài zhèlǐ yě hěn hǎo.
options.en: Not really — it's great here now.

options.zh: 会想念，特别是家人和食物。
options.py: Huì xiǎngniàn, tèbié shì jiārén hé shíwù.
options.en: Yes, especially family and the food.
Probably — I'm used to it now.

options.py: Bù quèdìng, yěxǔ huì huí lǎojiā.
options.en: Not sure — might go back home.

options.zh: 是的，我很喜欢这里的生活。
options.py: Shì de, wǒ hěn xǐhuān zhèlǐ de shēnghuó.

options.zh: 快四十了，时间过得真快。
options.py: Kuài sìshí le, shíjiān guò de zhēn kuài.
Cái èrshí chū tóu, hái niánqīng!
options.en: Only in my early twenties — still young!

options.zh: 比我大几岁，我们年纪差不多。
options.py: Bǐ wǒ dà jǐ suì, wǒmen niánjì chàbuduō.
options.en: A few years older than me — close in age.

options.zh: 已经六十多了，年纪不小了。
options.py: Yǐjīng liùshí duō le, niánjì bù xiǎo le.
options.en: Already in their sixties — getting on in years.

options.py: Zhù zài lǎojiā, lí wǒ bǐjiào yuǎn.
options.en: Lives back home — quite far from me.

options.py: Wǒ juéde shì wǒ de háizi.

options.zh: 是我老婆，她支持我做的一切。
options.py: Shì wǒ lǎopó, tā zhīchí wǒ zuò de yīqiè.
options.en: My wife — she supports everything I do.

options.zh: 我收藏老物件，喜欢有历史的东西。
options.py: Wǒ shōucáng lǎo wùjiàn, xǐhuān yǒu lìshǐ de dōngxi.
options.en: I collect antiques — I like things with history.

options.zh: 有时候在外面，有时候在家。
options.py: Yǒushíhou zài wàimiàn, yǒushíhou zài jiā.

options.zh: 喜欢去公园，环境好一点。
options.py: Xǐhuān qù gōngyuán, huánjìng hǎo yīdiǎn.
options.en: I like going to the park — better environment.

options.py: Wǒ zhōumò yībān zài jiā xiūxi.
options.en: On weekends I usually rest at home.

options.py: Zhōumò wǒ xǐhuān chūqù zǒu zou.
options.en: On weekends I like to go out for a walk.

options.zh: 周末很少有空，经常有事。
options.py: Zhōumò hěn shǎo yǒu kòng, jīngcháng yǒu shì.
options.en: Rarely have free time on weekends — always something going on.

options.py: Dàgài sān sì nián qián ba.
options.en: About three or four years ago.

options.py: Cóng xuésheng shídài jiù kāishǐ le.

options.zh: 很久了，已经记不太清楚了。
options.py: Hěn jiǔ le, yǐjīng jì bu tài qīngchǔ le.
options.en: A long time ago — I can't remember exactly.

options.zh: 从小就开始了，很难说多久。
options.py: Cóng xiǎo jiù kāishǐ le, hěn nán shuō duō jiǔ.
options.en: Since childhood — hard to say how long.

options.py: Cóng xiǎo jiù yǒu zhège àihào le.
Shì péngyǒu dài wǒ qù shì shi de.
options.en: A friend brought me along to try it.

options.zh: 是偶然的机会，没想到这么喜欢。
options.py: Shì ǒurán de jīhuì, méi xiǎngdào zhème xǐhuān.
options.en: A chance opportunity — didn't expect to like it so much.
I started when I was young.
A friend introduced me to it.

options.zh: 慢慢喜欢上的，说不清楚。
options.py: Màn man xǐhuān shàng de, shuō bu qīngchǔ.
options.en: Gradually came to like it — hard to say exactly why.

options.py: Ràng wǒ wàngjì gōngzuò de yālì.
options.en: It helps me forget work stress.

options.py: Fēicháng zhòngyào, shǎo le tā bù xíng.
options.en: Very important — I can't do without it.

options.py: Liǎng zhǒng dōu yǒu, kàn xīnqíng.

options.en: Let me tell you about me.

options.py: Yǒu yīdiǎn, dàn bù tài fùzá.
options.en: A bit of one — not too complicated.

options.zh: 没有特别的，就是家人取的。
options.py: Méiyǒu tèbié de, jiùshì jiārén qǔ de.
options.en: Nothing special — family just chose it.
It's OK — I'm used to it.
Sometimes feels a bit too ordinary.

options.py: Hái hǎo, jiùshì yòng guàn le.
options.en: It's fine — I'm just used to it.

options.zh: 朋友说好听，我自己没感觉。
options.py: Péngyǒu shuō hǎotīng, wǒ zìjǐ méi gǎnjué.
options.en: Friends say so — I don't really feel it myself.

options.py: Fēicháng xǐhuān! Yuè là yuè hǎo.
options.en: Love it! The spicier the better.

options.py: Hái hǎo, bù tài là de kěyǐ.
options.en: It's OK — not too spicy is fine.

options.zh: 不太喜欢，吃辣会不舒服。
options.py: Bù tài xǐhuān, chī là huì bù shūfu.
options.en: Not really — spicy makes me feel unwell.
A bit sweet and a bit salty.

options.py: Wèidào hěn nóng, hěn yǒu tèsè.

options.en: A little spicy, but very tasty.

options.py: Huì yīdiǎn, dàn bù tài hǎo.
options.en: A bit, but not very well.
Yes — mum used to make it often.

options.zh: 有时候，节日的时候会吃。
options.py: Yǒushíhou, jiérì de shíhou huì chī.
Bù tài duō, nà shíhou bù cháng jiàn.
options.en: Not much — it wasn't common back then.
Sure, but you'll need some ingredients.

options.zh: 我自己也不太会，一起学吧！
options.py: Wǒ zìjǐ yě bù tài huì, yīqǐ xué ba!
options.en: I'm not great at it either — let's learn together!

options.py: Hái méi qùguò, dàn hěn xiǎng qù.
options.en: Not yet, but I'd love to.
Once — I'd like to go again.

options.zh: 还不错，有些地方很特别。
options.py: Hái búcuò, yǒuxiē dìfāng hěn tèbié.
options.en: Pretty good — some parts were really special.
A bit tiring, but worth it.

options.zh: 去欧洲那次，见了很多新东西。
options.py: Qù Ōuzhōu nà cì, jiàn le hěn duō xīn dōngxi.
options.en: The Europe trip — so many new things.

options.zh: 第一次出国的时候，印象很深。
options.py: Dì yīcì chūguó de shíhou, yìnxiàng hěn shēn.
options.en: My first time abroad — left a deep impression.

options.zh: 最近去的那次，比较特别。
options.py: Zuìjìn qù de nà cì, bǐjiào tèbié.
options.en: The most recent one — pretty special.

options.zh: 去日本那次，喜欢那里的文化。
options.py: Qù Rìběn nà cì, xǐhuān nàlǐ de wénhuà.
options.en: The Japan trip — I loved the culture.

options.zh: 第一次长途旅行，很难忘。
options.py: Dì yīcì cháng tú lǚxíng, hěn nán wàng.
options.en: My first long trip — very memorable.

options.zh: 很难说，每次都有好的部分。
options.py: Hěn nán shuō, měi cì dōu yǒu hǎo de bùfen.
options.en: Hard to say — every trip had its highlights.

options.zh: 当地的食物很好吃，很有名。
options.py: Dāngdì de shíwù hěn hǎochī, hěn yǒumíng.
options.en: The local food is great and famous.

options.zh: 风景很美，和别的地方不一样。
options.py: Fēngjǐng hěn měi, hé bié de dìfāng bù yīyàng.
options.en: Beautiful scenery — different from other places.

options.py: Shì qù wán de, nán de de jiàqī.
options.en: Going for fun — a rare holiday.

options.zh: 工作去的，但也有时间游览。
options.py: Gōngzuò qù de, dàn yě yǒu shíjiān yóulǎn.
options.en: For work, but had time to sightsee.

options.zh: 两个都有，工作和旅游结合。
options.py: Liǎng gè dōu yǒu, gōngzuò hé lǚyóu jiéhé.

options.zh: 因为那里的文化很有意思。
options.py: Yīnwèi nàlǐ de wénhuà hěn yǒuyìsi.
options.en: Because the culture there is fascinating.

options.zh: 因为食物很好吃，景色也很美。
options.py: Yīnwèi shíwù hěn hǎochī, jǐngsè yě hěn měi.
options.en: Because the food is great and the scenery beautiful.

options.zh: 第一次去，什么都觉得新鲜。
options.py: Dì yīcì qù, shénme dōu juéde xīnxiān.
options.en: First time there — everything felt fresh.

options.py: Ràng wǒ xuédào hěn duō dōngxi.
options.en: I learned a lot from it.

options.py: Nà cì ràng wǒ gèng liǎojiě zìjǐ.
options.en: It helped me understand myself better.

options.py: Shuō bu qīngchǔ, jiùshì hěn nán wàng.
options.en: Hard to explain — just very memorable.
Because the cooking method is unique.
Hard to say — it's just delicious!

options.zh: 因为那里的文化很不一样。
options.py: Yīnwèi nàlǐ de wénhuà hěn bù yīyàng.
options.en: Because the culture is so different.

options.zh: 有很多新鲜的东西可以发现。
options.py: Yǒu hěn duō xīnxiān de dōngxi kěyǐ fāxiàn.
options.en: So many new things to discover.

options.py: Shuō bu qīngchǔ, qù le jiù zhīdào.
options.en: Hard to explain — you'd have to go yourself.

options.zh: 每个地方都有意思，很难选。
options.py: Měi gè dìfāng dōu yǒuyìsi, hěn nán xuǎn.
options.en: Every place is interesting — hard to choose.

options.zh: 因为那里的生活很方便。
options.py: Yīnwèi nàlǐ de shēnghuó hěn fāngbiàn.
options.en: Because life there is very convenient.

options.py: Yīnwèi nàlǐ de rén hěn yǒuhǎo.
options.en: Because the people there are very friendly.

options.zh: 因为有很多我喜欢的食物和地方。
options.py: Yīnwèi yǒu hěn duō wǒ xǐhuān de shíwù hé dìfāng.
options.en: Because of all the food and places I love.
Want to travel — relax a bit.

options.zh: 有一些计划，但还不确定。
options.py: Yǒu yīxiē jìhuà, dàn hái bù quèdìng.
options.en: Have some plans, but not certain yet.

options.zh: 我最近比较忙，稍后再约吧。
options.py: Wǒ zuìjìn bǐjiào máng, shāo hòu zài yuē ba.
options.en: I've been quite busy — let's schedule later.

options.py: Yǒu yīdiǎn yìsi, dàn bù quèdìng.
Shuō bù tài qīngchǔ, hái zài xiǎng.
options.en: Hard to say — still thinking about it.
